holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

overview.description: The IncomeSTKd 1x US Stocks & 1x Bitcoin Premium ETF (ISSB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is actively managed, combining exposure to bitcoin and large-cap US equities through derivatives while targeting a beta of 1.0. The fund uses leverage to stack the total return of its bitcoin holdings with the potential returns of the equity strategy ISSB was launched on Jan 20, 2026 and is issued by IncomeSTKd.
